message:
feat(support-matrix): close io_internal_abi wave 1 and refresh maintenance report

- Add regression test asserting 17 _IO_* wave-1 symbols stay Implemented
  in the support matrix maintenance report (new test:
  maintenance_report_marks_io_internal_wave1_symbols_implemented)
- Refresh support_matrix_maintenance_report.v1.json: 31 symbols
  reclassified from GlibcCallThrough to Implemented, native coverage
  rises from 95.4% to 96.2%, validation now 100% (3980/3980, 0 skipped)
- Resolve 66 previously-skipped symbols by mapping them to proper modules
  (glibc_internal_abi, rpc_abi, time_abi) instead of "unknown"
- Remove 3 stale iconv/resolv symbols from the skipped list
- Close bead bd-w2c3.2.1.2 (io_internal_abi wave 1) in issues.jsonl

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
